hero.headline: Medical & Health Care Services
hero.subtitle: Your health is our top priority. Schedule an appointment with us today.

services.title: Appointment Booking
services.description: Easy online scheduling for patients with automated reminders and calendar management.

services.title: Patient Records
services.description: Complete digital health records with history, diagnoses, prescriptions and lab results.

services.title: Billing & Invoices
services.description: Automated invoicing, payment tracking and financial reporting in one dashboard.

services.title: Staff Management
services.description: Manage your medical team, departments, roles, and permissions with ease.

services.title: Lab & Diagnostics
services.description: Integrated lab vendor management, test orders and results tracking.

services.title: Reports & Analytics
services.description: Actionable insights on clinic performance, revenue, and patient outcomes.

aboutDoctor.paragraph1: CareNova is designed by healthcare technology experts who understand the daily challenges of running a modern medical practice.
aboutDoctor.paragraph2: Our clinic uses the latest technology for effective treatments and seamless patient management.

dentalHealth.mainParagraph: We believe prevention and integrated care are the key to better outcomes. Our comprehensive approach ensures long-term health for every patient.

reviews.name: Dr. Ahmed Benali
reviews.text: CareNova transformed how we manage our clinic. Scheduling, billing, and patient records are now seamless.

reviews.name: Dr. Marie Fontaine
reviews.text: The multilingual support is outstanding. Our staff works in French and Arabic without any issues.

reviews.name: Dr. James Okafor
reviews.text: Setup took less than 15 minutes. The dashboard is intuitive and our team adopted it immediately.

reasons.title: 15-Minute Setup
reasons.description: Deploy your clinic website and management system in minutes, not days.

reasons.title: Multilingual
reasons.description: Full support for English, French, Arabic (RTL), and Spanish out of the box.

reasons.title: Fully Customizable
reasons.description: Adapt colors, branding, content and landing pages from the dashboard — no code needed.

features.topBarCustomText: 👋 Welcome — 📞 Call us to book an appointment!

seo.metaDescription: Modern clinic management software with appointment booking, patient records, billing, and staff management. Setup in 15 minutes.
seo.metaKeywords: clinic management, medical software, appointment booking, patient records, healthcare system

cta.description: Join clinics worldwide using CareNova to deliver better patient care.
cta.successMessage: Thank you! We'll contact you soon.
cta.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.companyDescription: Complete clinic management for modern healthcare. Appointments, patients, billing, and analytics in one place.
